study_title: Apis mellifera Transcriptome or Gene expression
exp_title: RNAseq of Apis mellifera capensis: fat body tissue
design: Library preparation using the illumina  TruSeq RNA Library Prep Kit (Illumina, San Diego CA) and sequencing on an illumina  HiSeq4000 were done at the Beijing Genomics Institute (BGI) in Hong Kong, China.
sample_description: extracted RNA from 3 individuals pooled for sequencing
